cycles: Fairy tales <mark>carry</mark> us through the night.
Fairy tales are <mark>meant to be dreamed</mark>.
Fairy tales are <mark>made to be told</mark>.
Fairy tales are <mark>crafted to be learned</mark>.
Fairy tales <mark>speak</mark> of love and loss.
Fairy tales <mark>transport</mark> us to distant lands.
Fairy tales are <mark>meant to be shared</mark>.
home.hero_desc: Märchenschatz brings Grimm, Andersen, and Swiss folk tales to life with a focused reading experience - paginated, accessible, and distraction-free.
home.no_account: No account required. Works offline after first visit.
home.features_desc: Every feature exists to get out of the way and let you read - at your pace, in your style.
home.cta_desc: Jump into a world of fairy tales - right now, for free.

product.title: Product
product.desc: Discover what makes Märchenschatz the best way to read classic fairy tales.
product.how_it_works_short: Under the hood - the technology behind the experience.
product.integrations_short: Works with your tools and devices.

product_features.title: Features
product_features.desc: A complete look at every capability built into the reader.

product_how_it_works.title: How it works
product_how_it_works.desc: A focused reading experience in four steps.
product_how_it_works.step_1_body: Browse by source - Grimm, Andersen, or Swiss folk tales - and pick any story from the sidebar.
product_how_it_works.step_2_body: Content is split into perfectly sized pages that adapt to your font size and screen.
product_how_it_works.step_3_body: Flip pages with swipe, tap zones, keyboard arrows, or the nav bar. Adjust typography to your preference at any time.
product_how_it_works.step_4_body: Your place, favorites, and settings are persisted on your device locally - no account needed.

product_integrations.title: Integrations
product_integrations.desc: Märchenschatz is a progressive web app - it installs on any device and works offline.
product_integrations.pwa_desc: Install on iOS, Android, or desktop from your browser - no app store required.
product_integrations.offline_desc: A service worker caches content so you can read without an internet connection.
product_integrations.screen_size_desc: The reader adapts to phones, tablets, and large monitors automatically.
product_integrations.keyboard_desc: Arrow keys, space bar, and custom shortcuts work out of the box.

use_cases.title: Use Cases
use_cases.desc: Märchenschatz is built for anyone who loves reading and listening - explore how different people use it.
use_cases.students_desc: Build fairy tale literacy, reading comprehension, and literary analysis.
use_cases.educators_desc: Use fairy tales didactically with digital resources and storytelling culture.
use_cases.professionals_desc: Unwind with timeless stories during commutes and breaks - read or listen.
use_cases.researchers_desc: Comparative narrative research with primary sources and folk motifs.
use_cases.creators_desc: Share classic tales through audio production, performances, and professional narration.

use_case_students.title: For Learners
use_case_students.desc: Build your fairy tale literacy and train your reading comprehension. Märchenschatz provides distraction-free access to the world of literature - ideal for language arts and independent discovery.
use_case_students.features_1: Original texts for precise literary analysis
use_case_students.features_2: Word count and reading time estimates for lesson planning
use_case_students.features_3: Adjustable typography for diverse reading needs
use_case_students.features_4: Speed reader mode to foster concentration
use_case_students.features_5: Focused on the text - no ads or distractions

use_case_educators.title: For Educators
use_case_educators.desc: Integrate fairy tales into your curriculum with a modern digital resource. Märchenschatz helps you promote storytelling culture in schools and develop competencies in listening, reading, and 'focus on literature'.
use_case_educators.features_1: Fairy tales under the lens: Compare and analyze variants
use_case_educators.features_2: Enhance listening skills through high-quality audio narrations
use_case_educators.features_3: Educational context: Background on sources and regional variants
use_case_educators.features_4: Easy access to local folk tales for cultural heritage lessons
use_case_educators.features_5: No registration required - immediate classroom deployment

use_case_professionals.title: For Adults
use_case_professionals.desc: Short on time but still want to unwind? Märchenschatz fits into commutes, lunch breaks, and wind-down routines - read or listen, whatever works for you.
use_case_professionals.features_1: Stories from 5-30 minutes - perfect for breaks
use_case_professionals.features_2: Automatic saving - pick up exactly where you paused
use_case_professionals.features_3: Read or listen - audio narration for on-the-go
use_case_professionals.features_4: E-ink style - easy on the eyes, even on long commutes
use_case_professionals.features_5: Offline mode - works everywhere, no internet needed

use_case_researchers.title: For Scholars
use_case_researchers.desc: A tool for comparative narrative research and folkloristics. Access digitized primary sources structured by region and Aarne-Thompson-Uther folk motifs.
use_case_researchers.features_1: Academic-grade source attribution for every work
use_case_researchers.features_2: Synchronized comparison of variants and adaptations
use_case_researchers.features_3: Digital representation of historic regional folk collections
use_case_researchers.features_4: Clean Markdown structure - ideal for text mining and corpus analysis
use_case_researchers.features_5: Open access to cultural heritage without paywalls

use_case_creators.title: For Narrators & Audio Producers
use_case_creators.desc: Podcasters, streaming artists, speakers - use our fairy tales as the foundation for audio productions, performances, and professional narration with complete preparation tools.
use_case_creators.features_1: 400+ tales - varied lengths, traditions, and styles
use_case_creators.features_2: Original texts with full source attribution
use_case_creators.features_3: Multiple variants - see how stories evolve across time
use_case_creators.features_4: Focused reader - perfect for rehearsing and preparing texts
use_case_creators.features_5: Free to use for personal and professional purposes

blog.title: Blog
blog.no_posts: No posts yet - check back soon.

about.title: About
about.p1: Märchenschatz is a passion project - a reader built for the love of fairy tales and good typography.
about.p2: Classic tales like those from the Brothers Grimm and Hans Christian Andersen belong to everyone. This app makes them freely accessible in a beautiful, distraction-free format that works on any device.
about.p3: The project is open source. Content is sourced from public domain collections and formatted in Markdown. New sources can be added by implementing a simple crawler adapter.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.desc: Märchenschatz is free to use - always. A Pro tier is coming for readers who want more.
pricing.free_tagline: No card, no account, no catch.
pricing.full_access: Full access to all fairy tales
pricing.pro_tagline: For readers who want the full experience.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.desc: This path doesn't lead anywhere. Perhaps a witch moved it.
